entity.summary: Metis single-sided automated-market-maker decentralized exchange designed for stable-asset swaps and liquidity provision.
entity.notes: The first-party Hummus domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Hummus AMM as a Metis single-sided AMM for stable cryptocurrencies and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Hummus Finance official exchange website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party Hummus exchange domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Hummus AMM protocol metrics and information
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies Hummus as a single-sided Metis AMM for stable-asset exchange and reports current TVL and non-zero recent DEX volume.
